articles.author: Kim Lyons
articles.title: The foldable iPhone may be in short supply upon release - Yahoo Tech
articles.description: The expected iPhone Ultra's advanced design is likely to pose challenges for manufacturing.
articles.content: Apple should see high demand for its as-yet-unconfirmed foldable iPhone Ultra but will likely struggle to produce enough of them, at least in the short term, analyst Ming-Chi Kuo writes in a Monday b… [+2508 chars]
